scripts.build: npm run build -w @possible/packs && npm run build -w @fraylabs/possible && npm run build -w @possible/mcp && npm run build -w @possible/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @possible/packs && npm run test -w @fraylabs/possible && npm run test -w @possible/mcp && npm run test -w @possible/web
scripts.check: npm run skill:validate && npm run demo:validate && npm run routes:validate && npm run test && npm run build && npm run publications:validate
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @possible/packs && npm run dev -w @possible/web
scripts.dev:mcp: npm run build -w @possible/packs && npm run dev -w @possible/mcp
